name: Slane
archetype: Level 8 Duelist, cold and calculating blade master
speech_patterns: Speaks in short, clipped sentences with technical combat terminology
Rarely uses pronouns, treats combat as mechanical process
Never apologizes or shows emotion, states facts about lethality
quirks: Evaluates everyone by their vulnerabilities first
Never makes eye contact, always watches hands
example_phrases: Your stance leaves the femoral exposed. Fix it.
Emotion dulls the blade. Both kinds.
Talked to three people today. Two were targets.
